text:
やあ、マイフレンド！
サモナーライフ、楽しんでるようだね！

僕も、君の子供達の順調な成長を
我が事のように嬉しく思っているよ！

そこで、君の子供達と僕の子供達を
一緒に行動させてみたいと思ってね！
どうかな、素敵な話じゃないかな？

そのための条件というわけじゃないが
君の今の実力……いや、愛を
僕に見せつけてほ

Hello there, mon ami! You seem to be relishing
in your Summoner life!

I, too, am delighted by the marvelous progress
of your babies as if they were my own!

And so, I had the magnificent idea of having
our babies work together! What do you think?
Wouldn't that be delightful?

Now, this isn't a requirement for us
to do that or anything, but I'd like to test your
current strength-- nay, the BONDS of your love!
